Anne-Louis Girodet de Roucy-Trioson

2 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Self-Portrait in a Hat
by Anne-Louis Girodet de Roucy-Trioson
France, 18th century · c. 1790 · black chalk, with stumping, heightened with traces of white gouache
The Meeting of Orestes and Hermione
by Anne-Louis Girodet de Roucy-Trioson
France, early 19th Century · c. 1800 · pen and brown and black ink, point of brush and brown and gray wash, with black chalk and graphite, heightened with white gouache, on cream wove paper
←Dante Gabriel Rossetti Attributed to Anne-Louis Girodet de Roucy-Trioson→
